cost_name: PEM Power Electronics — IGBT Rectifier System — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: IRENA 2024 power electronics cost breakdown + OEM rectifier cost data (ABB, Siemens Energy, Ingeteam)

confidence.rationale: Based on IRENA cost breakdown and OEM product data for IGBT-based rectifier systems at 100 MW scale.

primary_drivers: Active front-end for grid code compliance
exclusions: Harmonic filtering (if required by grid code)

sources.title: IRENA Green Hydrogen Cost Reduction 2024 — Power electronics cost breakdown
sources.author: IRENA
